name: Pineapple Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat together the butter, eggs, and brown sugar.
2. Combine the flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and chopped macadamia nuts; stir half into the egg mixture.
3. Add the finely chopped fresh pineapple to the mixture, then stir in the remaining flour mixture.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 8x4x2-inch loaf pan.
5. Sprinkle the sugar and cinnamon evenly over the top of the bread.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
